sourceMovie.title: Knights of the Zodiac
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Knights of the Zodiac (2023) stuck because it commits to its fantasy premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Tomek Bagiński's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The fantasy and action blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Doctor Strange
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Knights of the Zodiac clicked for you, Doctor Strange (2016) is a strong next stop: both trade in fantasy and action, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Knights of the Zodiac clicked for you, Logan (2017) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and science fiction, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Knights of the Zodiac?
faq.answer: Try Doctor Strange, Logan, Batman—each shares DNA with Knights of the Zodiac while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Knights of the Zodiac?
faq.answer: Knights of the Zodiac (2023) is best described as Fantasy, Action, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Knights of the Zodiac worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this fantasy lane.
